charts.title: ✓ Validation PASS — reproduces the paper's behaviour
charts.caption: Clusters stay aggregated (no separation)
charts.simulations: Validation report card. The PASS/FAIL badge is the result of an automated acceptance test (pbg_cpm_studies.gg1993.validate) evaluated against this study's own reproduced metric time series — not a hand-set verdict. total boundary length does not increase (aggregate stays compact)

charts.title: Fig 27
charts.caption: dispersal: clusters do not separate (2000 MCS).
charts.simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
charts.interpretation: Clusters remain attached, an extreme partial-sorting case just below the separation threshold (Fig 27).
